channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Canada's Trudeau returns home after Trump meeting without assurances that tariffs are off the table
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau returned home Saturday after his meeting with Donald Trump without assurances the president-elect will back away from threatened tariffs on all products from the major American trading partner.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NYT publishes email from Pete Hegseth's mom
item.description: The Times noted that Penelope Hegseth described their publishing of the email as "disgusting" and she apologized to her son in a follow-up email.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Emboldened 'manosphere' accelerates threats and demeaning language toward women after US election
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — In the days after the presidential election, Sadie Perez began carrying pepper spray with her around campus. Her mom also ordered her and her sister a self-defense kit that included keychain spikes, a hidden knife key and a personal alarm.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democratic lawmakers report Thanksgiving bomb threats against their homes
item.description: At least five Democratic members of Congress from Connecticut were targeted by bomb threats on Thursday. Police who responded said they found no evidence of explosives on the lawmakers' properties.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Americans' opinion of Republican Party on the rise
item.description: In the poll, 45 percent of Americans said they feel “favorable” toward the Republican Party, up 6 points from an Economist/YouGov poll in late October, when 39 percent said they felt favorable toward GOP.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps Kevin Hassett as National Economic Council head
item.description: President-elect Trump has chosen former White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett to lead the National Economic Council in his next administration, he said Tuesday. “I am very pleased to announce that Dr. Kevin A.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: President Trump endorses Patronis & Fine for congressional seats
item.description: Two Florida leaders are already emerging as potential frontrunners to replace Former Congressman Matt Gaetz and current U.S. Representative Mike Waltz in D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump's tariffs may be targeted at others — but they could impact you too
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump threatened to slap hefty tariffs on China, Canada and Mexico. Those tariffs would hurt America too — if they are carried out.
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley, MPR News

item.title: Lauren Boebert Cameo page disappears amid House ethics concerns
item.description: Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-Colo.) briefly offered videos on Cameo, a website on which public figures sell personalized videos to fans, before the page went offline amid questions about whether it would have violated House ethics rules.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Post-election poll: Trump victory, cabinet choices, war, and aliens through voters' eyes
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's popularity is on the rise and the voters who went against him think World War III is likely.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Walmart becomes latest — and biggest — company to roll back its DEI policies
item.description: Conservative groups have filed lawsuits against workplace diversity initiatives that prioritize historically marginalized groups.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: State bar counsel filed 2 complaints against Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones
item.description: The office of the state bar counsel, in its effort to discipline Clark County Commissioner Justin Jones, filed a complaint in February 2024 and another in October where it alleges Jones violated several rules of professional conduct, according to documents the 8 News Now Investigators have obtained.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC
